meaning: n.(水母体内的)发光蛋白质
examples: This gene enables the jellyfish to glow with the bioluminescent protein aequorin.
Aequorin proved useful, particularly as a tool for studying nerves, which use the calcium ions it reacts with.
He identified the jellyfish's other glowing protein, Aequorin, while doing his graduate work at the University of Georgia.
For years, aequorin received most of the attention.
